processing_rules.rotation_matrix: Apply Quaternion rotation to audio__apply_effect(Pan) at δt intervals to create non-linear movement
processing_rules.phase_coherence: Maintain > 0.95 during 4D-translations to avoid phasing issues in mono
processing_rules.spatial_fractal: Recursive delay lines at Golden Ratio intervals (1.618) to create the sense of 'infinite room'

legacy.visual_sync: Synchronize with shader-code (code__create_audio_visualizer) using the same W-axis values
